heading: Subscription Expiration
body:
If your subscription expires:

- Atlas uses your configured payment method to pay any remaining
  charges.

- Atlas downgrades any support plan that you've
  purchased with your subscription.

If you have no payment method added to your organization, Atlas
prompts you to [payment method](payment-method) when you
make billing changes through the Atlas UI or Admin API. If your
payment method declines, your account will be at risk of suspension.

Once you [subscription](activate-subscription) your next subscription,
Atlas bills you for any unpaid charges. If your subscription becomes
delayed, contact your [MongoDB Sales](https://www.mongodb.com/company/contact?tck=docs)
representative.

To stop incurring any future charges, you must [pause and resume a cluster](pause-terminate-cluster) your deployments.
